name: Khao Tam Kung (Shrimp and Rice Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shrimp (about 10 to the pound size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp and rice soup by sautéing garlic until fragrant.
2. In a saucepan, bring the stock to a boil.
3. Add chopped celery, soy sauce, black pepper, and cooked rice to the boiling stock.
4. Return the stock to a boil once all ingredients are added.
5. Gently add the shrimp and cook until they turn pink.
6. Serve immediately, garnished with sautéed garlic and coriander leaves.
